justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'this Wednesday' and '9am' but queried a slightly wider window than strictly necessary, although it did not negatively impact the outcome.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered two close alternatives when the preferred time was unavailable and the user accepted one of them.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just two turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and successfully booking the appointment.
